sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 4.29 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.4)

statement.latex: Classify the irreducible matrix groups over a finite field that are generated by reflections, that is, by matrices with Jordan form${ diag}(-1, 1, , 1)$. { A.\,E.\,Zalesski } These are classified (A.\,E.\,Zalesski , V.\,N.\,Ser\"ezhkin, Math. USSR--Izv., { 17} (1981), 477--503; \ A.\,Wagner, Geom. Dedicata, { 9} (1980), 239--253; { 10} (1981), 191--203, 475-523).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
